chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 911 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution 23.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Rashif Arfi, advocate for the applicant This reference is pending since 2017 remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Today, almost nine years later same is the case and learned counsel merely seeks time. It appears that the applicant department is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
